seoTitle: Glen Alice vs Glen Alpine — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Glen Alice vs Glen Alpine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Alice and Glen Alpine.
heading: Glen Alice vs Glen Alpine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Alice, New South Wales and Glen Alpine, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Alice has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Glen Alpine (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Alice or Glen Alpine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Alice has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Glen Alpine scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Alice scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Alpine scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Alice or Glen Alpine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Alice has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
